title: Shagrad Loset

{{Quote|We specifically asked the Jedi ''[sic]'' stay out of this, since we were confident we could handle this. It's a Gotal issue, best handled by Gotal. Unfortunately, they meddled and we can now see the results of lightsaber diplomacy.|Shagrad Loset|<ref name="hnn1" />}}
'''Shagrad Loset''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who led the [[Gotal Foreign Affairs Commune]]<ref name="hnn1" /> on [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]]<ref name="hnn2">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|regional/13418_4.html|Gotal Guerillas Hijack Commuter Hopper, Take Hostages}}</ref> during a [[Gotal hostage standoff|hostage standoff]] on [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4]]. When the [[Roshu Sune/Legends|Roshu Sune]],<ref name="hnn1" /> a militant splinter branch of the [[Gotal Assembly for Separation/Legends|Gotal Assembly for Separation]], hijacked a [[Passenger liner/Legends|commuter hopper]] in the Atzerri [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Skreeka]],<ref name="hnn2" /> Loset<ref name="hnn1" /> and the Commune hoped to resolve the crisis independently of foreign aid<ref name="hnn2" /> and asked the peace-keeping [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] not to interfere in a matter that should be handled by Gotals.<ref name="hnn1" />

A [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force was dispatched to Atzerri by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] anyway, and their ensuing confrontation with the Roshu Sune saw two Jedi, twelve hostages, and all of the guerrillas [[Death/Legends|lose]] their lives. Loset later spoke to [[Journalist/Legends|reporters]] from [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] and criticized the Jedi Order for interfering in Gotal affairs and for the loss of life that occurred in the standoff, as he was confident that Commune could have resolved the standoff with minimal [[Blood/Legends|bloodshed]].<ref name="hnn1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shagrad Loset appeared in ''Gotal Standoff Ends Violently'', an article<ref name="hnn1" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Master">'{{InsiderCite|91|Star Wars Q&A|Ask the Master}}</ref> and published in ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 53]]'' on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="hnn1" /> on [[April 25]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN53 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6586618|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Mastadge|date=2002-04-25|time=5:54 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
